a:T32ec,<div class="specification">
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;">A rocket is accelerating upwards at 9.8 m s<sup>-2</sup> in deep space. A photon of energy 14.4 keV is emitted upwards from the bottom of the rocket and travels to a detector in the tip of the rocket 52.0 m above.</span></p>
<p><span style="background-color: #ffffff;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></span></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">Explain why a change in frequency is expected for the photon detected at the top of the rocket.</span></p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">Calculate the frequency change.</span></p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>b:T69be,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;"><em><strong>ALTERNATIVE 1</strong></em><br/></span></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">detector accelerates/moves away from point of photon emission ✔<br/></span></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">so Doppler effect / redshift ✔<br/></span></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">so <em>f</em> decreases ✔<br/></span></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;"><em><strong>ALTERNATIVE 2</strong></em><br/></span></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">equivalent to stationary rocket on earth’s surface ✔<br/></span></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">photons lose «gravitational» energy as they move upwards ✔<br/></span></p>
<p style="text-align:left;"><span style="background-color:#ffffff;">h<em> f <strong>OR</strong> f</em> decreases ✔</span></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align:left;"><img height="153" src="data:image/png;base64," width="460"/></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","a"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.HL.TZ2.9"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","a-5-general-relativity"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most candidates answered this question correctly using the equivalence principle and could show that the frequency would decrease.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Arithmetic mistakes were common at the different stages of the calculations even when the process used was correct.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
